common.tagline: Every game deserves a second turn

hero.lede: Where Baltic board gamers buy and sell their games.
hero.imageAlt: Watercolour illustration of a board game with hexagonal tiles, meeples, cards, and coins

features.heading: Built for the Baltic board game scene.

browse.label: Find your game
browse.title: Browse, filter, find.
browse.body: Filter by category, condition, country, and price. Every listing pulls cover art and game details from BoardGameGeek so what you see matches what's in the box. Bid in auctions, buy fixed-price listings, or post a wanted ad if no one's selling the title you're after.

items.name: Filter to taste
items.detail: By category, condition, country, and price.

items.name: Condition badges
items.detail: Five tiers from Like New to For Parts. Every listing has photos.

items.name: Auctions or buy now
items.detail: Bid against other buyers, or buy fixed-price outright.

items.name: Wanted listings
items.detail: Post a wanted ad and we'll notify you when one lands.

sell.label: Sell with confidence
sell.title: Three steps from shelf to sold.
sell.body: Search BoardGameGeek to match your exact edition: the right publisher, language, and printing. Set your price, grade your copy, drop it in a parcel locker. We handle the label, the payment, and the messaging.

items.name: BGG edition matching
items.detail: Pick the exact publisher, language, and printing you own.

items.name: Five-tier grading
items.detail: Grade each copy from Like New to For Parts.

items.name: Auctions or fixed price
items.detail: Pick the format that fits the game.

items.name: Wallet payouts
items.detail: Sales land in your wallet. Withdraw, or spend it on your next game.

ship.label: Ship across the Baltics
ship.title: 1 300+ lockers across three countries.
ship.body: The Unisend network connects Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia, including Latvijas Pasts and uDrop terminals. Drop off, the buyer collects. Typical delivery is 2–3 business days. Buyers picking multiple games from one seller split the shipping.

items.name: 1 300+ lockers
items.detail: Unisend, Latvijas Pasts, and uDrop networks combined.

items.name: 2–3 business days
items.detail: Typical delivery time across the Baltics.

items.name: Bundle and save
items.detail: Buy multiple games from one seller and split the shipping.

items.name: Auto-tracked
items.detail: Status updates from drop-off to collection. Built-in delivery deadlines.

payments.label: Pay safely
payments.title: Licensed payments. People handle disputes.
payments.body: Swedbank AS (Latvia) is our payment service provider, running on the EveryPay platform. If something goes wrong, we step in.

items.name: Swedbank AS
items.detail: Latvian credit institution, our payment service provider.

items.name: EveryPay platform
items.detail: Bank cards and Baltic bank links in one checkout.

items.name: Wallet for sellers
items.detail: Earnings land in a wallet you control.

items.name: Dispute resolution
items.detail: If buyer and seller can't agree, we review and decide.

items.q: Where can I buy and sell?
items.a: Latvia, Lithuania, and Estonia. Buyers in all three countries see every listing.
Sellers ship through Unisend parcel lockers. Cross-border drop-offs work across all three Baltic countries.
Buyers pay the item price plus shipping. Sellers pay 10% commission on the item price. Shipping isn't commissioned.
Sellers grade each copy on a five-tier scale: Like New, Very Good, Good, Acceptable, or For Parts. Buyers see this on every listing.
Swedbank AS (Latvia) is our payment service provider, with payments running on the EveryPay platform. Once an order completes, your earnings land in your platform wallet.
Every order has deadlines for acceptance, shipping, and delivery. If a dispute opens, we review what happened and help resolve it.

cta.heading: Pass them on.
cta.body: List your collection and let other gamers in the Baltics give them another turn.

staleAction.newVersionAvailable: A newer version is available. Please refresh the page.

checkout.obligationNote: By clicking, you confirm an order with an obligation to pay.
